name: CA's Unicenter TNG Framework: Entry-Level for the Industry's Best Enterprise Management Software Solution
description: Aberdeen Group analyst Peter S. Kastner profiles Computer Associates International's Unicenter TNG Framework, a free/bundled subset of Unicenter TNG announced July 14, 1997 at the CA World conference. The Framework provides auto-discovery, an object repository, 2D/3D mapping, event management, scheduling, and virus scanning—enabling 10-minute enterprise network discovery. Kastner analyzes CA's strategic shift to a 'razor/razor-blade' distribution model, bundling the Framework with server hardware from nine partners including HP and Digital Equipment, to establish it as a de facto enterprise management standard against IBM Tivoli, HP OpenView, and Sun Solstice.
